notes: cause: Clang could not find a declaration for a bpf_*-prefixed identifier. This almost always means the kernel-side helper surface is not on the include path: either Horizon's curated runtime/horizon_bpf.h wrapper was not included, or a broader kernel surface declared in vmlinux.h is required for this program.
suggest: Ensure runtime/horizon_bpf.h is on the clang include path (Horizon's curated wrapper surfaces the most-used bpf helpers without requiring vmlinux.h regeneration). If bpf_get_current_pid_tgid is not covered by runtime/horizon_bpf.h, regenerate vmlinux.h against your target kernel (`bpftool btf dump file /sys/kernel/btf/vmlinux format c > vmlinux.h`) and include it in your program.
